# Image Pack — Alderpoint Strategy & Operations (xl-consulting-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic consultants/headshots
- `office/` — enterprise consulting office + workshops
- `diagrams/` — savings math, RAID, milestone, staffing diagrams
- `social/` — hiring + thought leadership templates

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: enterprise consulting.
- Palette: deep blue + graphite + white with subtle gold accent.

## Safety
- No real brands.
- Avoid readable client names in office imagery.
